author: y4rr
content: Follow-up from Sprint C.7 (#626). GpuBackend methods: rfft_r_f32/f64, fft_f32/f64, irfft_c_f32/f64, fft_c_f32/f64, pad_truncate_complex_f32/f64. Best approach: use MPSMatrixFFT on macOS 14+ or vDSP (Accelerate) with a Metal blit encoder for data movement. Custom MSL Cooley-Tukey is feasible for power-of-2 sizes.
